steps.title: Identify the 'add more' signal
steps.content: The passage moves from describing the Art Institute's collection to suggesting visitors “should turn to Chicago's streets, where they can find works.” The signal is clear: the blank word should mean to expand or enhance the experience by finding additional art beyond the museum.

steps.title: Match the word to that signal
steps.content:
D) supplement means to add something to make complete or better—exactly what we need.

The other three don't work: mitigate means lessen, satisfy means fulfill but doesn't suggest adding more, and provoke doesn't fit the context.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
